tiktok.caption:
v0.26.0 is out.

The orchestrator API is off the public internet. No more raw access to the control plane.

Three forges are first class now: GitHub, Gitea, GitLab. One API, one review flow, pick your forge.

The Telegram Mini App is a real client now: today brief, approvals, chat, all live off one socket.

fastapi-guard is active enforcement. Not passive anymore.

I approved once. 25 agents shipped it.

roboco.tech
